title: NoChatReport
description: A *very* simple plugin that removes most of the chat reporting things added in 1.19.1.
body:
## This plugin is no longer supported, as there are _much_ better alternatives.

# NoChatReport > ~~For support, join my Discord: ~~ A *very* simple plugin that removes most of the chat reporting things added in 1.19.1. This should work with most chat formatting plugins, though I do not guarantee that it will. ## Hide Chat Toasts and Chat Bars I recommend using [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hide-chat-toasts-and-chat-bars) as well, as it removes the toast when joining and the ugly bars on the left of the chat window.
